matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU's 600-dpi Hough plate 242 is headed JUNIPERUS PACHYPHLOEA and Alligator Juniper; Juniperus pachyphloea is a documented synonym of Juniperus deppeana. The middle specimen is printed as RADIAL SECTION.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened after derivation at original crop resolution. This is an exposed longitudinal wood face with strong horizontal banding and fine ray figure; no bark-only area, tree, foliage, product scene, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries

matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU's Hough plate 242 labels the species JUNIPERUS PACHYPHLOEA / Alligator Juniper and the lower specimen TANGENTIAL SECTION; J. pachyphloea is a documented synonym of Juniperus deppeana.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened after derivation at original crop resolution. The crop is entirely the exposed tangential specimen face, with curved growth-ring figure and no living plant, bark-only surface, furniture, flooring, or microscopy.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
